passed_names: BR1 — Band-range in AVAILABILITY STEP: 'Any evenings please' → find_next_available + preferred_time=evening
BR2 — Single day + band in AVAILABILITY STEP: 'Thursday evening' → availability + date + preferred_time
BR3 — Band OR weekday in AVAILABILITY STEP: 'evenings or Saturdays' → ONE call
BR4 — Recurring weekday no band in AVAILABILITY STEP: 'any Saturdays?' → find_next_available + requested_weekday
BR5 — Multi-day band fixture: confirmed_band=evening stored from response, presents 2-day offer
